title: BreweryX Recipe Book
description:
Automatic in-game guide for BreweryX. No more Wikis!
Thank you: Brim🦊
body:
🍺 BreweryX Recipe Book

The ultimate in-game guide for your BreweryX server. No more Wikis!

Stop forcing your players to check websites or ask admins “How do I brew Vodka?”
BreweryX Recipe Book automatically reads all your drinks from BreweryX/recipes.yml and generates a beautiful, interactive book with full instructions.

✨ Features
⚡ Fully Automatic

You don’t need to write recipes manually! The plugin hooks into the BreweryX folder and reads your config.

Added a new drink?

Just reload the server.

The recipe appears in the book instantly!

🙈 Hide Recipes from the Book

If you want a recipe not to show up in the book, open your BreweryX config (BreweryX/recipes.yml) and add this to the recipe:
hidden: true

📜 Detailed Instructions

Each page shows exact details for brewing:

📦 Ingredients: Exact item amounts.

🔥 Cooking: Boiling time in minutes.

⚗️ Distilling: Required number of runs.

⏳ Aging: Aging years and the specific Wood type (e.g., Oak, Spruce, Acacia).

💀 Difficulty: Recipe difficulty level.

🌍 Multi-Language Support

Includes translations out of the box:

🇺🇸 English (en)

🇷🇺 Russian (ru)

You can easily switch the language in the config or create your own translation file. Supports HEX Colors in names and lore.

🎨 Native RPG Look

Uses the vanilla “Written Book” interface. Keeps the immersion of your server intact.

🛠️ Installation

Download BreweryX Recipe Book.

Make sure you have BreweryX
 installed.

Drop the .jar file into your /plugins folder.

Restart your server.

That’s it! The plugin will automatically detect your recipes.

💬 Commands & Permissions

/brewbook (aliases: /bbook, /recipes) — Get the Recipe Book.

Permission: brewerybook.use

(Default: true — available to everyone)

⚙️ Configuration

Simple configuration file at plugins/BreweryBook/config.yml:

language: en
Language setting
Available by default: en, ru
You can add your own files (e.g. de.yml, fr.yml) inside the plugin folder.
